---
title: "C160 Final Project"
author: "Quentin Mei"
date: "2026-03-18"
output: html_document
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = TRUE)
```

## Data preparation
```{r}
library(data.table)
library(ggplot2)
library(comorbidity)
library(faircause)

DATA_DIR <- "/Users/meizunhong/Downloads/UCLA\ Courses/Stats\ C160/C160\ Final\ Project/C160\ Final\ Dataset"

# Helper: build path flexibly — edit this if your layout differs
fp <- function(...) file.path(DATA_DIR, ...)

cat("Loading core tables...\n")

patients   <- fread(fp("patients.csv"))
admissions <- fread(fp("admissions.csv"))
icustays   <- fread(fp("icustays.csv"))

icustays[, intime  := as.POSIXct(intime)]
icustays[, outtime := as.POSIXct(outtime)]

#consider first stay of patient
first_stays <- icustays[order(subject_id, intime)][, .SD[1], by = subject_id]
cat("  First ICU stays:", nrow(first_stays), "\n")
```

## Build analysis dataset -- Z variable
```{r}
dat <- merge(
  first_stays[, .(subject_id, hadm_id, stay_id, intime)],
  patients[, .(subject_id, anchor_age, gender)],
  by = "subject_id"
)
setnames(dat, c("anchor_age", "gender"), c("age", "sex"))

# Add mortality outcome (Y)
dat <- merge(
  dat,
  admissions[, .(hadm_id, hospital_expire_flag)],
  by = "hadm_id"
)
setnames(dat, "hospital_expire_flag", "death")

# Encode sex as numeric (Female = 0, Male = 1) — matching vignette convention
dat[, sex := as.integer(sex == "M")]
nrow(dat)
```

## Get BMI from table and binarize
```{r}
omr <- fread(fp("omr.csv"))

# Filter to BMI rows, clean values
bmi_data <- omr[grepl("BMI", result_name, ignore.case = TRUE)]
bmi_data[, bmi_value := as.numeric(result_value)]
bmi_data <- bmi_data[!is.na(bmi_value) & bmi_value >= 10 & bmi_value <= 80]
bmi_data[, chartdate := as.Date(chartdate)]
bmi_data <- merge(bmi_data, first_stays[, .(subject_id, intime)], by = "subject_id")
bmi_data[, days_before := as.numeric(difftime(as.Date(intime), chartdate, units = "days"))]

# Prefer BMI recorded before ICU admission
bmi_before <- bmi_data[days_before >= 0]

# Take the closest pre-admission BMI per patient
bmi_per_patient <- bmi_before[order(subject_id, days_before)][
  , .(bmi = first(bmi_value)), by = subject_id
]

# Fallback: if too few patients have pre-admission BMI, use most recent BMI
if (nrow(bmi_per_patient) < 10000) {
  cat("  Warning: only", nrow(bmi_per_patient), 
      "patients with pre-admission BMI. Falling back to most recent BMI.\n")
  bmi_per_patient <- bmi_data[order(subject_id, -chartdate)][
    , .(bmi = first(bmi_value)), by = subject_id
  ]
}

# Inner join: drop patients without BMI (cannot impute treatment variable)
dat <- merge(dat, bmi_per_patient, by = "subject_id", all.x = FALSE)
cat("  Patients with valid BMI:", nrow(dat), "\n")

# Binarize: obese (BMI >= 30) vs non-obese (BMI < 30)
dat[, obese := as.integer(bmi >= 30)]
cat("  Obese:", sum(dat$obese == 1), "| Non-obese:", sum(dat$obese == 0), "\n")

# Keep bmi for Table 1 descriptive stats; we'll drop it before fairness_cookbook()
rm(omr, bmi_data, bmi_before, bmi_per_patient)
gc()
```
## Admission Service Type
```{r}
services <- fread(fp("services.csv"))

# First service per hospital admission
first_service <- services[order(hadm_id, transfertime)][, .SD[1], by = hadm_id]

# Categorize into broad groups (matching the vignette's categories)
first_service[, diag := fcase(
  curr_service %in% c("MED", "CMED", "OMED", "GU", "GYN", "OBS"), "MED",
  curr_service %in% c("SURG", "CSURG", "NSURG", "VSURG", "TSURG", 
                       "ORTHO", "DENT", "ENT", "PSURG"),              "SURG",
  curr_service %in% c("TRAUM"),                                       "TRAUM",
  curr_service %in% c("NMED", "NB", "NBB"),                           "NMED",
  default = "OTHER"
)]

dat <- merge(dat, first_service[, .(hadm_id, diag)], by = "hadm_id", all.x = TRUE)
dat[is.na(diag), diag := "OTHER"]

cat("  Diagnosis type distribution:\n")
print(table(dat$diag))

rm(services, first_service)
gc()
```

## Mediator
```{r}
diagnoses <- fread(fp("diagnoses_icd.csv.gz"))
diagnoses <- diagnoses[hadm_id %in% dat$hadm_id]

# Separate by ICD version
diag_9  <- diagnoses[icd_version == 9,  .(hadm_id, icd_code)]
diag_10 <- diagnoses[icd_version == 10, .(hadm_id, icd_code)]

charlson_scores <- data.table(hadm_id = integer(), charlson = numeric())

if (nrow(diag_10) > 0) {
  cci_10 <- comorbidity(
    x = as.data.frame(diag_10),
    id = "hadm_id", code = "icd_code",
    map = "charlson_icd10_quan", assign0 = FALSE
  )
  # Score BEFORE converting to data.table (score() needs the comorbidity class)
  charlson_10 <- score(cci_10, weights = "quan", assign0 = FALSE)
  cci_10 <- as.data.table(cci_10)
  cci_10[, charlson := charlson_10]
  charlson_scores <- rbind(charlson_scores, cci_10[, .(hadm_id, charlson)])
}

if (nrow(diag_9) > 0) {
  cci_9 <- comorbidity(
    x = as.data.frame(diag_9),
    id = "hadm_id", code = "icd_code",
    map = "charlson_icd9_quan", assign0 = FALSE
  )
  charlson_9 <- score(cci_9, weights = "quan", assign0 = FALSE)
  cci_9 <- as.data.table(cci_9)
  cci_9[, charlson := charlson_9]
  charlson_scores <- rbind(charlson_scores, cci_9[, .(hadm_id, charlson)])
}

# If a hadm_id appears in both ICD versions, take the max
charlson_scores <- charlson_scores[, .(charlson = max(charlson)), by = hadm_id]

dat <- merge(dat, charlson_scores, by = "hadm_id", all.x = TRUE)
dat[is.na(charlson), charlson := 0]

range(dat$charlson)

rm(diagnoses, diag_9, diag_10, charlson_scores)
gc()

labevents <- fread(
  fp("labevents.csv"),
  select = c("subject_id", "hadm_id", "itemid", "charttime", "valuenum")
)
cat("  labevents loaded:", nrow(labevents), "rows\n")

# Key lab itemids:
#   50813 = Lactate
#   50878 = AST
#   50821 = PaO2
#   50816 = FiO2
lab_items <- c(50813, 50878, 50821, 50816)

labs <- labevents[itemid %in% lab_items]
labs <- labs[hadm_id %in% dat$hadm_id]
labs[, charttime := as.POSIXct(charttime)]

rm(labevents)
gc()

# Filter to first 24 hours of ICU admission
labs <- merge(labs, dat[, .(hadm_id, stay_id, intime)], by = "hadm_id")
labs[, hours_since_icu := as.numeric(difftime(charttime, intime, units = "hours"))]
labs_24 <- labs[hours_since_icu >= 0 & hours_since_icu <= 24 & !is.na(valuenum)]

cat("  Lab values in first 24h:", nrow(labs_24), "\n")

lact_24 <- labs_24[itemid == 50813,
                   .(lact_24 = max(valuenum, na.rm = TRUE)), by = stay_id]

# --- AST: worst = highest ---
ast_24 <- labs_24[itemid == 50878,
                  .(ast_24 = max(valuenum, na.rm = TRUE)), by = stay_id]

# --- PaO2/FiO2 ratio (paired approach) ---
# Compute ratio per blood gas draw, then take worst (lowest)
pao2_vals <- labs_24[itemid == 50821, .(stay_id, charttime, pao2 = valuenum)]
fio2_vals <- labs_24[itemid == 50816, .(stay_id, charttime, fio2 = valuenum)]

# Standardize FiO2: if > 1, treat as percentage
fio2_vals[fio2 > 1, fio2 := fio2 / 100]
fio2_vals <- fio2_vals[fio2 > 0]  # avoid division by zero

# Pair by closest timestamp within same stay
if (nrow(pao2_vals) > 0 & nrow(fio2_vals) > 0) {
  setkey(pao2_vals, stay_id, charttime)
  setkey(fio2_vals, stay_id, charttime)
  paired <- fio2_vals[pao2_vals, on = .(stay_id, charttime), roll = "nearest"]
  paired[, pafi := pao2 / fio2]
  pafi_24 <- paired[!is.na(pafi) & is.finite(pafi),
                    .(pafi_24 = min(pafi, na.rm = TRUE)), by = stay_id]
} else {
  pafi_24 <- data.table(stay_id = integer(), pafi_24 = numeric())
}

# Merge labs into main dataset
dat <- merge(dat, lact_24,  by = "stay_id", all.x = TRUE)
dat <- merge(dat, ast_24,   by = "stay_id", all.x = TRUE)
dat <- merge(dat, pafi_24,  by = "stay_id", all.x = TRUE)

cat("  Lab coverage — lact:", sum(!is.na(dat$lact_24)),
    "| ast:", sum(!is.na(dat$ast_24)),
    "| pafi:", sum(!is.na(dat$pafi_24)), "\n")

rm(labs, labs_24, lact_24, ast_24, pao2_vals, fio2_vals, pafi_24)
if (exists("paired")) rm(paired)
gc()

```
## Impute Missing Values
```{r}
imp_lst <- list(
  charlson = 0,
  lact_24  = 1,       # normal lactate ~ 1 mmol/L
  ast_24   = 20,      # normal AST ~ 20 U/L
  pafi_24  = 500,     # normal PaO2/FiO2 ~ 500
  death    = FALSE
)

for (i in seq_len(ncol(dat))) {
  var <- names(dat)[i]
  if (any(is.na(dat[[var]])) & !is.null(imp_lst[[var]]))
    dat[is.na(get(var)), c(var) := imp_lst[[var]]]
}

# Ensure death is numeric
dat[, death := as.integer(death)]
```

## Descriptive Table
```{r}
cat("\n===== TABLE 1: COHORT CHARACTERISTICS =====\n")
cat("Total patients:", nrow(dat), "\n\n")

# Summary by obesity status
for (grp in c(0, 1)) {
  sub <- dat[obese == grp]
  label <- ifelse(grp == 1, "Obese (BMI >= 30)", "Non-obese (BMI < 30)")
  cat(label, " (n =", nrow(sub), ")\n")
  cat("  Age:      mean =", round(mean(sub$age), 1),
      ", sd =", round(sd(sub$age), 1), "\n")
  cat("  Male:    ", round(mean(sub$sex) * 100, 1), "%\n")
  cat("  BMI:      mean =", round(mean(sub$bmi), 1),
      ", sd =", round(sd(sub$bmi), 1), "\n")
  cat("  Mortality:", round(mean(sub$death) * 100, 2), "%\n")
  cat("  Charlson:  mean =", round(mean(sub$charlson), 1), "\n")
  cat("  Lactate:   mean =", round(mean(sub$lact_24), 2), "\n")
  cat("  PaFi:      mean =", round(mean(sub$pafi_24), 1), "\n")
  cat("  AST:       mean =", round(mean(sub$ast_24), 1), "\n")
  cat("  Diag distribution:\n")
  print(round(prop.table(table(sub$diag)) * 100, 1))
  cat("\n")
}
```

## Prepare Data for Faircause
```{r}
dat[, c("subject_id", "hadm_id", "stay_id", "intime", "bmi") := NULL]

# Handle the diag factor: dummy-code it for fairness_cookbook()
# (Random forest internals handle numeric/binary better than multi-level factors)
diag_levels <- unique(dat$diag)
# Create binary indicators, drop one reference category (OTHER)
for (dx in setdiff(diag_levels, "OTHER")) {
  dat[, paste0("diag_", dx) := as.integer(diag == dx)]
}
dat[, diag_orig := diag]  # keep original for heterogeneity stratification
dat[, diag := NULL]
cat("Final variables:", paste(names(dat), collapse = ", "), "\n")
cat("Final cohort size:", nrow(dat), "\n\n")
```

## Define Causal Model
```{r}
X <- "obese"
Z <- c("age", "sex")
Y <- "death"

# Mediators: dummy-coded diag + continuous clinical variables
W_diag <- grep("^diag_(?!orig)", names(dat), value = TRUE, perl = TRUE)
W <- c(W_diag, "charlson", "lact_24", "pafi_24", "ast_24")

cat("Treatment (X):", X, "\n")
cat("Confounders (Z):", paste(Z, collapse = ", "), "\n")
cat("Mediators (W):", paste(W, collapse = ", "), "\n")
cat("Outcome (Y):", Y, "\n\n")
```

### TV decomposition
```{r}
model_cols <- c(X, Z, W, Y)
dat_model <- as.data.frame(dat[, ..model_cols])

fcb <- fairness_cookbook(
  data = dat_model,
  X = X, Z = Z, W = W, Y = Y,
  x0 = 0, x1 = 1
)
p_main <- autoplot(fcb) +
  labs(
    title = "Causal Decomposition of Mortality Difference: Obesity Paradox (MIMIC-IV)",
    y = "Mortality difference"
  ) +
  theme_minimal(base_size = 14) +
  scale_x_discrete(
    labels = c("Total Variation", "Direct", "Indirect", "Confounded"),
    name = "Pathway"
  ) +
  scale_fill_discrete(
    labels = c("Total Variation", "Direct", "Indirect", "Confounded"),
    name = "Pathway"
  )

print(p_main)
ggsave("main_decomposition.pdf", p_main, width = 10, height = 6)
summary(fcb)
names(dat)
```

## Heterogeneity Analysis by age group
```{r}
dat[, age_group := cut(age,
                       breaks = c(17, 49, 64, 74, 100),
                       labels = c("18-49", "50-64", "65-74", "74+"))]

het_age <- list()
het_age_summary <- data.table()

for (ag in levels(dat$age_group)) {
  sub <- dat[age_group == ag]
  n_obese <- sum(sub$obese == 1)
  n_non   <- sum(sub$obese == 0)
  
  cat("  Age group", ag, ": n_obese =", n_obese, ", n_non_obese =", n_non, "\n")
  
  if (n_obese > 50 & n_non > 50) {
    sub_model <- as.data.frame(sub[, ..model_cols])
    het_age[[ag]] <- fairness_cookbook(
      data = sub_model,
      X = X, Z = Z, W = W, Y = Y,
      x0 = 0, x1 = 1
    )
    
    s_dt <- as.data.table(het_age[[ag]]$measures)
    s_dt[, age_group := ag]
    het_age_summary <- rbind(het_age_summary, s_dt, fill = TRUE)
  } else {
    cat("    -> Skipped (insufficient sample size)\n")
  }
}

for (ag in names(het_age)) {
  p <- autoplot(het_age[[ag]]) +
    labs(
      title = paste("Decomposition — Age Group:", ag),
      y = "Mortality difference"
    ) +
    theme_minimal(base_size = 14)
  print(p)
  ggsave(paste0("decomp_age_", gsub("-", "_", ag), ".pdf"), p, width = 10, height = 6)
}
str(fcb)
```

## By diagnose type
```{r}
het_diag <- list()
het_diag_summary <- data.table()

# When stratifying by diag, remove diag dummies from W
W_no_diag <- setdiff(W, W_diag)

for (dx in unique(as.character(dat$diag_orig))) {
  sub <- dat[diag_orig == dx]
  n_obese <- sum(sub$obese == 1)
  n_non   <- sum(sub$obese == 0)
  
  cat("  Diagnosis:", dx, ": n_obese =", n_obese, ", n_non_obese =", n_non, "\n")
  
  if (n_obese > 50 & n_non > 50) {
    model_cols_sub <- c(X, Z, W_no_diag, Y)
    sub_model <- as.data.frame(sub[, ..model_cols_sub])
    
    het_diag[[dx]] <- fairness_cookbook(
      data = sub_model,
      X = X, Z = Z, W = W_no_diag, Y = Y,
      x0 = 0, x1 = 1
    )
    
    s_dt <- as.data.table(het_diag[[dx]]$measures)
    s_dt[, diagnosis := dx]
    het_diag_summary <- rbind(het_diag_summary, s_dt, fill = TRUE)
  } else {
    cat("    -> Skipped (insufficient sample size)\n")
  }
}

# Individual plots per diagnosis type
for (dx in names(het_diag)) {
  p <- autoplot(het_diag[[dx]]) +
    labs(
      title = paste("Decomposition — Diagnosis:", dx),
      y = "Mortality difference"
    ) +
    theme_minimal(base_size = 14)
  print(p)
  ggsave(paste0("decomp_diag_", tolower(dx), ".pdf"), p, width = 10, height = 6)
}
```

## Combined Heatmap
```{r}
# ============================================================
# PART 18: COMBINED HEATMAP (Lecture 14 style, slides 23/26)
# ============================================================

cat("\nBuilding cross-stratified heatmap (age × diagnosis)...\n")

cross_results <- data.table()

for (ag in levels(dat$age_group)) {
  for (dx in c("MED", "SURG")) {  # focus on the two largest groups
    sub <- dat[age_group == ag & diag_orig == dx]
    n_obese <- sum(sub$obese == 1)
    n_non   <- sum(sub$obese == 0)
    
    cat("  Age:", ag, "| Diag:", dx, 
        "| n_obese:", n_obese, "| n_non:", n_non, "\n")
    
    if (n_obese > 30 & n_non > 30) {
      model_cols_sub <- c(X, Z, W_no_diag, Y)
      sub_model <- as.data.frame(sub[, ..model_cols_sub])
      
      fcb_sub <- tryCatch({
        fairness_cookbook(
          data = sub_model,
          X = X, Z = Z, W = W_no_diag, Y = Y,
          x0 = 0, x1 = 1
        )
      }, error = function(e) {
        cat("    -> Error:", conditionMessage(e), "\n")
        return(NULL)
      })
      
      if (!is.null(fcb_sub)) {
        s_dt <- as.data.table(fcb_sub$measures)
        s_dt[, `:=`(age_group = ag, diagnosis = dx)]
        cross_results <- rbind(cross_results, s_dt, fill = TRUE)
      }
    } else {
      cat("    -> Skipped (insufficient sample)\n")
    }
  }
}

# Build heatmap if we have results
if (nrow(cross_results) > 0) {
  # Extract direct effect rows (ctfde = counterfactual direct effect)
  de_results <- cross_results[measure == "ctfde"]
  
  if (nrow(de_results) > 0) {
    # Add confidence interval labels
    de_results[, ci_low  := value - 1.96 * sd]
    de_results[, ci_high := value + 1.96 * sd]
    de_results[, label := paste0(
      round(value * 100, 1), "%\n[",
      round(ci_low * 100, 1), "%, ",
      round(ci_high * 100, 1), "%]"
    )]
    
    p_heat <- ggplot(de_results, aes(x = diagnosis, y = age_group, fill = value)) +
      geom_tile(color = "white", linewidth = 1) +
      geom_text(aes(label = label), size = 3.5, fontface = "bold") +
      scale_fill_gradient2(
        low = "#4575B4", mid = "white", high = "#D73027", 
        midpoint = 0,
        name = "Direct\nEffect",
        labels = scales::percent
      ) +
      labs(
        title = "Heterogeneous Direct Effect (Age / Admission Type)",
        subtitle = "Obesity Paradox — MIMIC-IV",
        x = "Diagnosis Group",
        y = "Age Group (years)"
      ) +
      theme_minimal(base_size = 14) +
      theme(panel.grid = element_blank())
    
    print(p_heat)
    ggsave("heatmap_direct_effect.pdf", p_heat, width = 8, height = 6)
  }
  
  # Also build indirect effect heatmap
  ie_results <- cross_results[measure == "ctfie"]
  
  if (nrow(ie_results) > 0) {
    ie_results[, ci_low  := value - 1.96 * sd]
    ie_results[, ci_high := value + 1.96 * sd]
    ie_results[, label := paste0(
      round(value * 100, 1), "%\n[",
      round(ci_low * 100, 1), "%, ",
      round(ci_high * 100, 1), "%]"
    )]
    
    p_heat_ie <- ggplot(ie_results, aes(x = diagnosis, y = age_group, fill = value)) +
      geom_tile(color = "white", linewidth = 1) +
      geom_text(aes(label = label), size = 3.5, fontface = "bold") +
      scale_fill_gradient2(
        low = "#4575B4", mid = "white", high = "#D73027", 
        midpoint = 0,
        name = "Indirect\nEffect",
        labels = scales::percent
      ) +
      labs(
        title = "Heterogeneous Indirect Effect (Age / Admission Type)",
        subtitle = "Obesity Paradox — MIMIC-IV",
        x = "Diagnosis Group",
        y = "Age Group (years)"
      ) +
      theme_minimal(base_size = 14) +
      theme(panel.grid = element_blank())
    
    print(p_heat_ie)
    ggsave("heatmap_indirect_effect.pdf", p_heat_ie, width = 8, height = 6)
  }
  
  # Print all cross-stratified results as a summary table
  cat("\n===== CROSS-STRATIFIED RESULTS =====\n")
  for (ag in unique(cross_results$age_group)) {
    for (dx in unique(cross_results$diagnosis)) {
      sub_res <- cross_results[age_group == ag & diagnosis == dx]
      if (nrow(sub_res) > 0) {
        cat(sprintf("\n  Age: %s | Diag: %s\n", ag, dx))
        for (i in 1:nrow(sub_res)) {
          cat(sprintf("    %-8s: %+.4f  (sd = %.4f)\n",
                      sub_res$measure[i], sub_res$value[i], sub_res$sd[i]))
        }
      }
    }
  }

}
```
